question: Simple Network Management Protocol (SNMP)
canonical_answer:
Used to collect network information by polling stations and sending traps (or alerts0 to a management station. __________ has many well-known vulnerabilities, including default cleartext community strings (passwords). ______ operates on TCP/UDP ports 161 (agent) and 162 (manager). Secure ______ uses TCP/UDP ports 10161 (agent) and 10162 (manager).

*Hint: term is the same for all blanks

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ Core 1 Study Guide
appears_in.answer: A LAN that, using VLAN-capable switches, places some (or any on the more expensive VLANs) systems on virtual broadcast domains.

appears_in.title: Mike Meyers Comptia Videos
appears_in.answer: DHCP requests are answered with bogus IP addresses from rogue server setup by an attacker
